full_text:
Heat Wave Continues Into Monday
Following the heat on Sunday, more of the same is here to start the work week.
Afternoon highs will once again trend towards record levels today as the Heat Wave continues.
At the same time, overnight lows will struggle to drop below the low to mid-60s, meaning there will be little relief from those temperatures even during the overnight hours.
Here's Chief Meteorologist John Mayer to explain how long the Heat Wave will continue
